logout.option_1: Mission complete. Time to warp back to base.
logout.option_2: Logging out now. Your bookmarks will hold the line.
logout.option_3: Stealth mode engaged. You are about to disappear.
logout.option_4: Shutting the portal. Re-enter whenever you are ready.
logout.option_5: Session signed off. See you on the next run.

inactivity_modal.title: Are you still there?
inactivity_modal.description: Your session has been inactive for 10 minutes.
inactivity_modal.auto_logout_warning: If you do not answer, we will close your session in 5 minutes.

validation.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address
